name: retail-docdb-demo
description: One Codebase, Any Cloud: Building a Retail Database with OSS and Azure DocumentDB

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.demo:pull: docker compose pull && docker compose up ollama -d && docker exec docdb-ollama ollama pull nomic-embed-text && docker compose down
scripts.demo:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.replication.yml --profile hq --profile warehouse down
